posts.author: Aloysius_De_Sa
posts.community: Balu Forge | Forging Ahead with Defense and Aerospace Ambitions Amid Capital Efficiency Concerns |
posts.text: Main reason is governance concerns. I think Balu Forge is doing things right, but the 2024 pref allotment to entities connected to the Mahadev App betting case as well as the more recent IT raid has put off demand to an extent. As long as management does not make things worse and deliver on outcomes, the market forgets eventually

posts.author: Aarti
posts.community: Balu Forge | Forging Ahead with Defense and Aerospace Ambitions Amid Capital Efficiency Concerns |
posts.text: Balu Forge has got everything right: 1. Has been transitioning from only auto ancillary to Defense and Aerospace – removing concentration risk (got its first Aerospace order last month from USA company 2. Adding capacity in both forging (backward integration) and machining. Also increasing its capability to produce larger and heavier equipment making it similar to Bharat Forge 3. Promoter subscribed to warrants – showing commitment 4. Low debt 5. High ROCE of 23% Then why is price falling? 1. Because FIIs have been selling. However Minerva has bought large amount in June. 2. Very low DIIs – on…
